Testimonials.title: What members say
Testimonials.subtitle: Cinephiles who found their type — and their people.
Testimonials.quote_1: The CineTest read me better than friends who've known me for years. My picks finally feel personal.
Testimonials.quote_2: I came for the personality test and stayed for the community. Found people who love the exact films I do.
Testimonials.quote_3: Movie Nights with my private group became our weekly ritual. Best feature, hands down.
Testimonials.quote_4: Filtering by mood and era is a game changer — I always find something worth watching.
Testimonials.quote_5: My recommendations keep getting better the more I watch. It actually learns my taste.
Testimonials.quote_6: Matching by taste, not an algorithm gaming me, is exactly what I wanted.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.
Faq.a1: A short, film-first quiz of 48 questions. It maps how you watch, feel, and choose into one of sixteen cinema personas — your CineType.
Faq.q2: Do I need to pay to start?
Faq.a2: No. Create an account and take the CineTest for free. Upgrade only when you want more matches and features.
Faq.a3: We tune film picks to your CineType and your taste across genre, mood, era, and vibe — and they sharpen as you watch more.
Faq.q4: Can I match with other people?
Faq.a4: Yes. Match with viewers who share your taste, see who liked your profile, and follow the ones you click with.
Faq.a5: Private group sessions where you and friends pick and watch films together. Available on Pro and above.
Faq.q6: Where does the film data come from?
Faq.a6: Film details come from TMDB. CinePersona uses the TMDB API but isn't endorsed or certified by TMDB.
Faq.support_description: We're happy to help you get started.

PrivacyPage.meta_description: How CinePersona collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPage.intro: This policy explains what data we collect when you use CinePersona, why we collect it, and the choices you have over it.
PrivacyPage.s1_body: We collect the account details you provide when you sign up, the CineTest answers and film activity you create, and basic technical data such as your device type and approximate location.
PrivacyPage.s2_body: Your data powers your CineType results, film recommendations, and community profile. We also use it to keep accounts secure, respond to support requests, and improve the product.
PrivacyPage.s3_body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and privacy-respecting analytics to understand how features are used. You can clear cookies in your browser at any time.
PrivacyPage.s4_body: We never sell your personal data. We share it only with the service providers that run CinePersona, such as hosting and payment processors, or when the law requires it.
PrivacyPage.s5_body: We keep your data while your account is active and delete it within a reasonable period after you close it. Data is encrypted in transit and access is limited to staff who need it.
PrivacyPage.s6_body: You can access, export, correct, or delete your data from your settings, or by contacting us through the about page. We respond to every request we receive.

TermsPage.meta_description: The rules and conditions for using CinePersona.
TermsPage.title: Terms of service
TermsPage.intro: These terms set out the rules for using CinePersona. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to them.
TermsPage.s1_body: By accessing CinePersona you accept these terms and our privacy policy. If you don't agree with them, please don't use the service.
TermsPage.s2_body: You're responsible for the activity on your account and for keeping your credentials secure. You must be old enough to use the service in your country.
TermsPage.s3_body: Treat other members with respect. Don't post unlawful, hateful, or spam content, attempt to disrupt the service, or misuse other people's data.
TermsPage.s4_body: You keep ownership of the posts, comments, and profile content you create. You grant us a licence to display that content within CinePersona so the community can see it.
TermsPage.s5_body: Paid plans renew until you cancel. Prices and features may change, and we'll give notice before any change that affects your current plan.
TermsPage.s6_body: CineType results and recommendations are for entertainment and the service is provided as is. Questions about these terms can be sent through the about page.

AboutPage.meta_description: Learn about CinePersona, our mission, our team, and how to reach us.
AboutPage.title: Where film lovers find their people
AboutPage.subtitle: We're on a mission to turn film taste into real connection — matching you with movies you'll love and the people who get them.
AboutPage.story_p1: We started CinePersona because finding your next great film — and someone to watch it with — felt harder than it should be. Taste was scattered across endless watchlists and feeds.
AboutPage.story_p2: So we built one place to discover films, take the CineTest, and match with people who share your taste. Today a growing community hosts Movie Nights, joins discussions, and finds their next favorite together.

Team.title: The people behind the product
